title: QA Automation Lab
description: Testing framework playground combining Playwright and Pytest for end-to-end scenarios in media websites.
descriptionEs: Laboratorio de testing que combina Playwright y Pytest para escenarios end-to-end sobre webs de media.
overview: Automation-first framework for robust end-to-end validation across web media platforms.
overviewEs: Framework orientado a automatizacion para validacion end-to-end robusta en plataformas web de media.

en: Layered structure for config, fixtures, page objects and tests.
Environment-based execution with secure credentials strategy.
Smoke, regression and critical business-flow validation.
CI integration for early feedback on each change.
es: Estructura por capas para config, fixtures, page objects y tests.
Ejecucion por entornos con estrategia segura de credenciales.
Validacion de smoke, regresion y flujos criticos de negocio.
Integracion en CI para feedback temprano en cada cambio.

demo.title: Execution Dashboard
demo.caption: Test execution summary and status.
demo.captionEs: Resumen y estado de ejecucion de tests.

demo.title: HTML Report
demo.caption: Detailed report with steps and traces.
demo.captionEs: Reporte detallado con pasos y trazas.
